news.t: Invesco takes the regulatory steps to expand its ETF business in Japan
'I don't see anything on the horizon that can stop the growth of the ETF market,' Invesco official says. Here are her 2021 predictions
This New ETF Is Targeting Companies That Could Join The Highflying Nasdaq-100

holdings.infoBox: QQQJ is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are Teradyne stock at 3.03%, Astera Labs at 2.91%, Nebius Group at 2.75%, Flex Ltd. at 2.55%, and CoreWeave at 2.45%.

overview.description: The Invesco NASDAQ Next Gen 100 ETF (QQQJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Next Generation 100 index, a modified market-cap-weighted, narrow index of 100 non-financial stocks that are next-eligible for inclusion in the NASDAQ-100 Index. QQQJ was launched on Oct 13, 2020 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: The Nasdaq turns 50. How the exchange has impacted markets over the last half-century
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani looks back on 50 years of the Nasdaq's history as a stock exchange with Dave Nadig, chief investment officer and director of research at ETF Trends and ETF Database.
